title: reseda barrelieri var. sessiliflora
intro: Reseda barrelieri var. sessiliflora, also known as dyer's rocket, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Reseda barrelieri var. sessiliflora include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
